notes: Evals run 2026-04-28 (simulation). 3 scenarios: implement-vue (4/4=1.0), i18n (3/4=0.75), webpack (2/4=0.5). The @conduction/nextcloud-vue conditional alias IS specified. Core Conduction conventions (useObjectStore, CnDataTable, scoped styles, t() with app-name) are fully specified.
